description_long: This is a modern, single-story house surrounded by lush landscaping, including dense green and purple-leaved trees and shrubs. The house features a flat roof with multiple outdoor terrace spaces, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a prominent front staircase leading to the main entrance. The exterior is finished in a combination of gray and white materials, with clean, geometric lines and open-plan interior spaces visible through the windows. The property is set on a rectangular green lawn, with a paved walkway leading up to the front steps. The rear and side elevations reveal additional terraces and large glass doors, enhancing the indoor-outdoor connection. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and multiple terraces, surrounded by dense landscaping and a prominent front staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a staircase, large windows, and dense landscaping framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive terrace areas, large glass doors, and the integration of the house with surrounding trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional terraces, flat roof sections, and a clear view of the open-plan interior through expansive windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more visible landscaping, large windows, and a secondary entrance or patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide staircase, large glass door, and is framed by landscaping with no porch or columns.
